description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on every push and pull request to any branch. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11, 3.12, 3.13). For each version, check out the repository with submodules, install Python, set up Graphviz, upgrade pip, install dependencies from requirements.txt, install pypa/build, and build a binary wheel and source tarball with python -m build.
